---
title: "Chapter 3 - Data and programming"
format: html
editor: visual
---

<https://book.stat420.org/data-and-programming.html>

# 3.1 Data types 

-   Numeric

-   Integer

-   Complex

-   Logical

-   Character

# 3.2 Data structures

| Dimension | Homogeneous | Heterogeneous |
|-----------|-------------|---------------|
| 1         | Vector      | List          |
| 2         | Matrix      | Data Frame    |
| 3+        | Array       | \-            |

## 3.2.1 Vectors

```{r}
c(1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9)
```

```{r}
x <- c(1, 3, 5, 7, 8, 9)
x
```

```{r}
c(42, "Statistics", TRUE)
```

```{r}
c(42, TRUE)
```

```{r}
(y = 1:100)
```

```{r}
# Scalar
2
```

```{r}
seq(from = 1.5, to = 4.2, by = 0.1)
```
